query: SELECT id, scanId, domain, httpStatus, securityHeaderGrade, totalFindings, JSON_LENGTH(forms) as formCount, JSON_LENGTH(detectedTechnologies) as techCount, JSON_LENGTH(externalLinks) as extLinkCount, JSON_LENGTH(cookies) as cookieCount, JSON_LENGTH(exposedPaths) as exposedPathCount FROM web_crawl_results WHERE totalFindings > 0 ORDER BY totalFindings DESC LIMIT 5
